query:
INSERT INTO memory_context (userId, taskId, taskTitle, summary, keywords, memoryType, importance, expiresAt, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 810033, '[资源存档] L029 FMHY freemediaheckyeah', 'CATEGORY:LEARNING_RESOURCE | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:STANDARD_COPYRIGHT | STARS:8700 | LANG:JavaScript | CORE:Internet largest free resource collection covering ad-blocking, privacy, AI, streaming, music, gaming, reading, education, Android, iOS, Linux, macOS — index only no file hosting. CAPABILITIES:[ad_blocking_privacy_resources,AI_tools_resources,streaming_gaming_resources,educational_resources,multi_platform_Android_iOS_Linux_macOS,community_recommendations,security_protection_guides,RSS_subscription] USAGE:[WEB_APP,DOCS_REF] INTEGRATION_NOTES:No direct integration; AI tools category useful for discovering new AI tools; security guides applicable to TARGET_SYSTEM security hardening; reference use only. URL:https://fmhy.net/', '免费资源,AI工具,隐私保护,安全指南,学习资源', 'workflow', 2, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810034, '[资源存档] L030 OpenStock', 'CATEGORY:FINANCIAL_DATA | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:AGPL-3.0 | STARS:10100 | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:Open-source stock market platform with free market data tracking, personalized alerts, company insights, AI-personalized welcome emails and daily news summaries. TECH_STACK:[Next.js_15,React_19,TypeScript,Tailwind_CSS_v4,shadcn/ui,Radix_UI,Better_Auth,MongoDB,Finnhub_API,TradingView_widgets,Inngest,Nodemailer] CAPABILITIES:[email_auth,global_search_CommandK,personalized_watchlist,detailed_stock_info_TradingView_charts,market_overview_heatmap_quotes_news,AI_personalized_welcome_email,daily_AI_news_summary_email,keyboard_shortcuts] USAGE:[DOCKER,CLI] INTEGRATION_NOTES:AGPL-3.0 limits commercial embedding; tech stack highly overlaps with TARGET_SYSTEM (shadcn/Finnhub/TradingView) — use as feature reference; AI email summary pattern for notification system; TradingView widget integration patterns directly reusable. URL:https://github.com/Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock', 'OpenStock,股票平台,shadcn,Finnhub,TradingView,AI邮件摘要,技术栈参考', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810035, '[资源存档] L031 大盘云图 cloudmap', 'CATEGORY:DATA_VIZ | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:UNSPECIFIED | STARS:21 | LANG:JavaScript | CORE:A-share market data heatmap visualization displaying price changes, PE/PB ratio, dividend yield, volume. STATUS:LOW_PRIORITY CAPABILITIES:[full_screen_display,A_share_Shanghai_Shenzhen_ChiNext,multi_data_types_price_PE_PB_dividend_volume,Vercel_deployable] USAGE:[WEB_APP] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Low integration value — 21 Stars, inactive maintenance, A-share only; heatmap data type list has reference value for TARGET_SYSTEM heatmap feature design; implementation should be built from scratch. URL:https://github.com/Dec-Crystal/cloudmap', '大盘云图,热力图,A股,估值热力图,市场可视化', 'workflow', 1, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810036, '[资源存档] L032 World Monitor', 'CATEGORY:DATA_VIZ | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:AGPL-3.0_non_commercial_COMMERCIAL_available | STARS:1000 | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:AI-driven real-time global intelligence dashboard integrating 435+ curated news sources with AI-synthesized briefings, dual map engines (3D globe + WebGL flat), 45 data layers, country intelligence index, financial radar covering 92 exchanges. TECH_STACK:[Vanilla_TypeScript,Vite,globe.gl,Three.js,deck.gl,MapLibre_GL,Tauri_2,Rust,Ollama,Groq,OpenRouter,Transformers.js,Redis_Upstash,Vercel_Edge] CAPABILITIES:[435+_news_sources_AI_briefings,dual_map_3D_globe_WebGL_flat_45_layers,cross_stream_correlation_military_economic_disaster,country_intelligence_index_12_signals,financial_radar_92_exchanges_commodities_crypto,local_AI_Ollama,5_site_variants_FINANCE,native_desktop_Tauri_2,21_languages] USAGE:[WEB_APP,CLI,DOCKER] INTEGRATION_NOTES:TARGET_SYSTEM already has WorldMonitor module; financial radar (92 exchanges) + geopolitical-financial signal correlation are unique capabilities NOT yet in TARGET_SYSTEM; local AI (Ollama) pattern for offline mode. URL:https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor', 'World Monitor,全球情报,92交易所,地缘政治,金融雷达,3D地球,Ollama本地AI', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810037, '[资源存档] L033 Databuddy Analytics', 'CATEGORY:DATA_VIZ | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:AGPL-3.0 | STARS:959 | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:Full-stack analytics and data management platform providing real-time analytics, user behavior tracking, data visualization with multi-tenancy, GDPR compliance, A/B testing, funnel analysis, cohort analysis. TECH_STACK:[TypeScript,Next.js,React,Turborepo,Bun,Tailwind_CSS] CAPABILITIES:[real_time_analytics_dashboard,user_behavior_tracking,advanced_data_viz,multi_tenancy,real_time_updates,custom_metrics_goal_tracking,conversion_funnel_cohort_analysis,AB_testing,export,GDPR_compliance_data_encryption,API_access] USAGE:[API,WEB_APP,SAAS] INTEGRATION_NOTES:AGPL-3.0 limits commercial embedding; GDPR-compliant self-hosted analytics as Google Analytics alternative; applicable to TARGET_SYSTEM user behavior analytics and platform metrics; funnel analysis for user onboarding optimization. URL:https://github.com/databuddy-analytics/Databuddy', 'Databuddy,用户行为分析,GDPR合规,漏斗分析,A/B测试,自托管分析', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810038, '[资源存档] L034 Graphic Walker', 'CATEGORY:DATA_VIZ | TYPE:GITHUB_LIB | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:3100 | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:Open-source Tableau alternative as embeddable React component enabling drag-and-drop data analysis and natural language queries — pure frontend with Web Workers, no backend required. CAPABILITIES:[drag_drop_interactive_data_analysis,natural_language_chat_interface_queries,data_interpreter_explains_patterns,Web_Workers_pure_frontend_no_backend,grammar_of_graphics_visualization,spatial_viz_GeoJSON_TopoJSON,light_dark_theme,universal_query_interface] USAGE:[NPM] INTEGRATION_NOTES:MIT unrestricted commercial use; pure frontend React component directly embeddable in TARGET_SYSTEM; natural language query aligns with AI-first design; no backend reduces integration complexity; applicable to portfolio analysis and financial data exploration. URL:https://github.com/Kanaries/graphic-walker', 'Graphic Walker,Tableau替代,拖拽分析,自然语言查询,React嵌入,纯前端,数据探索', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810039, '[资源存档] L035 Defeat Beta API', 'CATEGORY:FINANCIAL_DATA | TYPE:GITHUB_LIB | LICENSE:Apache-2.0 | STARS:527 | LANG:Python | CORE:Open-source Yahoo Finance alternative using Hugging Face-hosted dataset with DuckDB OLAP for sub-second SQL queries, extended financial metrics, automated DCF valuation, LLM-driven earnings analysis, MCP server, and Skills integration. CAPABILITIES:[Yahoo_Finance_alternative_HuggingFace_no_rate_limits,sub_second_SQL_DuckDB_OLAP,extended_metrics_TTM_EPS_PE_PS_PB_PEG_ROE_ROIC_WACC_ROA,SEC_filings_earnings_transcripts_stock_news,revenue_by_segment_geography,automated_DCF_valuation_WACC_10yr_cashflow_fair_price_Excel,LLM_earnings_analysis_quarterly_forecasts,MCP_server,Skills_implementation] USAGE:[PIP,API,SKILL_PLUGIN] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Apache-2.0 commercial use; HuggingFace dataset eliminates Yahoo Finance rate limiting — directly addresses TARGET_SYSTEM data reliability issue; DuckDB sub-second queries improve financial data performance; MCP server enables direct AI agent invocation; automated DCF valuation is high-value feature NOT yet in TARGET_SYSTEM; Skills compatible with Manus SKILL.md. URL:https://github.com/defeat-beta/defeatbeta-api', 'Defeat Beta,Yahoo Finance替代,DuckDB,DCF估值,MCP服务器,SKILL.md,无速率限制,SEC文件', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW());
